title: ScrappedMons - A Cobblemon Addon
description: Scrapped no longer! ScrappedMons adds Pokémon based on official scrapped designs from Gamefreak seamlessly into Cobblemon as if they were an official release!
body:
## Scrapped no longer! 
This datapack adds Pokémon **inspired by** official scrapped designs from Gamefreak seamlessly into Cobblemon as if they were official releases! These include fully animated models with booming personalities, movepools including TMs and Egg Moves for those who enjoy grinding with other mods, and even in-game cries!
That said this is a strictly non-profit project! No donation links or anything of the sort will or should ever be attached to this project or any variations of it, otherwise it is free to use and play with

This addon is still in development and will receive further updates with more new Pokémon! None of this could have been possible without all the artists that I commissioned <3
- Models built and animated by Doctor X, Witchdagger, and Tortu152.
- Code written by SaddestShark (who is no longer affiliated with the team) and Doctor X.
- Stats, Move Pools, and other in-game data made by Fumple-Wumper and Oofydo.
- In-Game Cries made by Doctor X
- Gorochu fan-design made by Foxeaf on DeviantArt.
- All other original designs made by Gamefreak

### Unscrapped Pokémon so far:
- **Gorochu**, the Volatile Pokémon **[ELECTRIC/FIRE]** - A new evolution of Pikachu, obtained with a Fire Stone
- **Scuta**, the Diving Beetle Pokémon **[BUG/WATER]**, and its evolution **Mantiverous**, the Swimming Mantis Pokémon **[BUG/WATER]** - Scuta evolves after reaching level 34 and learning the move Dive
- **Tumbell**, the Peanut Pokémon **[GROUND/GRASS]**, and its evolution **Sproutopod**, the Cracked Nut Pokémon **[GROUND/GRASS]** - Tumbell evolves after reaching high friendship and visiting a floral biome
- **Feistling**, the Fire-Eating Pokémon **[FIRE/ROCK]**, and its evolution **Cassowrath**, the Ramming Crest Pokémon **[FIRE/ROCK]** - Feistling evolves after reaching high friendship
- **Tentango**, the Berry Stack Pokémon **[WATER/FAIRY]** and its evolution Umamirage, the Delicacy Pokémon **[WATER/FAIRY]** - Tentango evolves after learning the move Recycle

### Pokémon Coming Soon:
- **Decifer**, the Puzzle Pokémon **[PSYCHIC/ROCK]** - An evolution of Unown
- **Chemlure**, the Spit Pokémon **[POISON/PSYCHIC]**, and its evolution **Luremaessile**, the Artillery Pokémon **[POISON/PSYCHIC]** - Bioluminescent hybrids of chameleons and squids
- **Flamenco**, the Diva Pokémon **[FIGHTING/FAIRY]** - The flamingo we always deserved
- **Flaura**, the Lotus Pokémon **[FAIRY/GRASS]** - A different evolution for Floette
- AND MORE...
